docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-20-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT MASSEY, ERIN NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-23-2021

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66658622)
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-20-2021 CONTINUED TO JUL-20-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-20-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
